name: Hayabusa Zenin
description:
Hayabusa is a cocky ninja and strongest swordsman, he was trained and raised by his elderly master, Akira Tajima since both of his parents died when he was 9 years old during the war. Making him responsible for the clan named "Karasu Clan" elevates his status within his master considerably. It transforms him from simply a skilled student into a leader and administrator, requiring a different set of skills and responsibilities. It suggests that he possesses not only combat skills but also leadership qualities, strategic thinking, and diplomatic abilities.
